positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a wandering astronaut's helmet reflecting a fantastical, bioluminescent nebula and stylized constellations. The helmet acts as the primary central subject and focal point. Use thick, clean black outlines (line art style) against a rich, gradient cosmic background featuring deep purples, electric blues, and cyan neon accents. The overall mood should be ethereal and mysterious. Composition must be clean and balanced, ideal for a t-shirt print. Flat vector illustration style, strong silhouettes, high contrast, pop art meets scientific diagram. Centered composition, designed for textile printing, seamless pattern potential. Concept art, matte finish, pop art style, graphic novel ink drawing.
